title: Cobblemon EasyEggCheck Pasture Block
description: You are able to check if there is an egg in the Pasture Block from all sides now.
body:
# **Cobblemon EasyEggCheck Pasture Block**

## **Info**
You are able to check if there is an egg in the Pasture Block from all sides now.

## **This pack includes/replaces**
* assets\cobblemon\textures\block\pasture.png
* assets\cobblemon\textures\block\pasture_particle.png

## **Showcase**
Check the "showcase pictures" folder

## **Known issues**
None

# **Dependecies (Mods YOU NEED)**
[**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)\
[**Cobbreeding**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)

## **To-do**
* _Nothing yet._

# **Credits**
_WizzStar_  

## **Contact**
_**Discord: WizzStar**_\
You can contact me for issues, but also requests and/or ideas.
